resources.string: Use the remote: highlight a button below, then press OK to continue.
Use your phone camera to quickly open the activation page.
1. On your phone or computer, go to iptv.afifistudio.com
2. Enter the activation code shown below.
Pick up where you left off.
Sync your playlist or try another category.
Add your Xtream Codes account or M3U playlist to start watching.
Try another category or sync your playlist.
Something went wrong while loading your catalog.
This channel could not be loaded. Try again or choose another stream.
This M3U playlist could not be loaded. Check the URL and try again.
Your IPTV account has expired. Reconnect with updated credentials or choose another source.
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
This title exceeds the profile rating limit
Connect a source and sync your catalog to see movies, series, and channels.
Sync your playlist to browse live TV and the program guide.
Browse movies and series to add them to your list.
Tip: Long press on any item to remove it from your list.
All your saved movies, series, and channels in one place.
Require PIN for Live TV categories
Try a different search term or filter.
Your recent searches will appear here.
Find your favorite movies, series, and live channels.
IPTV Cinema v1.0.0 — Phase 5 Supabase Integration
Launch on Live TV, auto-start last profile, and HDMI-CEC options.
App language follows your Android TV system language. Change it in device Settings → Language.
New episode alerts and sync notifications are enabled.
Manage your account, preferences, and device settings.
Paste your playlist URL and optional EPG guide.
Your credentials are used only to connect to your IPTV provider. You can remove this source anytime.
Preview the app with sample content.
IPTV Cinema does not provide channels or streams. Use your own legal provider.
Add a playlist URL with optional EPG.
Add your first Xtream account or M3U playlist to start watching.
Your playlist URL is used only to import channels from your provider. You can remove this source anytime.
Connect your provider to start watching live TV, movies, and series.
Use server URL, username, and password.
